title: War Machine
shortSynopsis: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

title: Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere
shortSynopsis: With rare access and no holds barred, the acclaimed documentarian investigates a growing ultra-masculine network and its controversial influencers.

title: Shark Tale
shortSynopsis: A tiny white lie turns a little fish into an unlikely hero. But when the truth comes out, he teams up with an outcast great white shark for protection.

title: KPop Demon Hunters
shortSynopsis: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

title: Double Jeopardy
shortSynopsis: Wrongly convicted and imprisoned for murdering her husband, a woman plots the ultimate revenge when she discovers he's still alive.

title: Nuremberg
shortSynopsis: A US Army psychiatrist forms a troubling bond with Hermann Göring while probing the nature of evil in this historical drama based on true events.

title: Nobody 2
shortSynopsis: Still paying off his debt to the mob, assassin and father Hutch finds his relaxing family vacation disrupted by a violent crime boss seeking revenge.

title: The Boss Baby
shortSynopsis: A kid finds himself at the center of a corporate plot thanks to his new baby brother — who only talks business when their parents aren't around.

title: 27 Dresses
shortSynopsis: Jane, a bridesmaid dozens of times but never the bride, faces a new dilemma when she agrees to plan her sister's wedding to the man she secretly loves.

title: Jurassic World Rebirth
shortSynopsis: On a mission to find dinosaur DNA for a miracle drug, a team of experts must fight to survive against the remote island's carnivorous inhabitants.

title: Made in Korea
shortSynopsis: A woman from a small town in Tamil Nadu moves to South Korea — a place she always dreamed of — but struggles to find her footing in a foreign land.

title: The Secret Agent
shortSynopsis: Hunted by a powerful enemy, a man carrying a secret disappears into the crowd amid the country's military dictatorship.

title: Street Flow 3
shortSynopsis: Grieving and facing the consequences of their crimes, the Traoré brothers get one last chance to forge a new path in the final chapter of this trilogy.

title: With Love
shortSynopsis: When old schoolmates meet on a blind date, they resolve to reconnect with past flames and express unspoken feelings, while growing closer to each other.

title: Firebreak
shortSynopsis: Little Lide disappears in the forest while her family packs up their home. As a fire breaks out, her mother must race to reach her before the flames do.

title: Accused
shortSynopsis: A renowned gynecologist's life unravels as serious allegations threaten her career and marriage, while her wife seeks to uncover the truth.

title: Dhurandhar
shortSynopsis: In the early 2000s, an undercover operative infiltrates Karachi's underworld, breaking into its inner circle to dismantle a violent nexus from within.

title: The Orphans
shortSynopsis: Two childhood friends must overcome their differences when their old flame dies in a suspicious car accident and her teenage daughter seeks revenge.

title: Banduan
shortSynopsis: Desperate to meet his young daughter, a newly freed ex-con must survive a night of violence after he's forced to protect police from a ruthless gang.

title: Strangers in the Park
shortSynopsis: A former communist militant and a "live and let live" man form an unlikely friendship on a park bench, sharing their life stories with humor and heart.

title: ONE PIECE: Season 2
shortSynopsis: Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates set sail for the legendary Grand Line, encountering wondrous new lands and fresh dangers in their quest for treasure.

title: The Dinosaurs: Season 1
shortSynopsis: From the first dinosaurs to the last, this epic documentary series examines their 165 million years on Earth and the forces that shaped their evolution.

title: Love Is Blind: The Reunion
shortSynopsis: After the weddings, the Pod Squad from "Love Is Blind: Ohio" shares relationship statuses and receipts in this tell-all reunion special.

title: Virgin River: Season 7
shortSynopsis: Newly married, Mel and Jack pursue their dream of adopting a baby, while old loves smolder and new threats challenge Virgin River.

title: Bridgerton: Season 4
shortSynopsis: In a new tale from the ton, eternal bachelor Benedict Bridgerton finally meets his match: a captivating lady's maid in disguise at a masquerade ball.

title: Age of Attraction: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Age is thrown out the window when singles search for their soulmates in this dating series. Is love truly ageless, or will the years come between them?

title: ONE PIECE: Season 1
shortSynopsis: With his straw hat and ragtag crew, young pirate Monkey D. Luffy goes on an epic voyage for treasure in this live-action adaptation of the popular manga.

title: Vladimir: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: When an English professor becomes obsessed with a handsome new colleague, her already complicated marriage and career are thrown into total chaos.

title: The Night Agent: Season 3
shortSynopsis: Peter teams with a reporter to expose the elusive Broker and stop a terrorist attack, unaware that a powerful conspiracy is plotting to bury the truth.

title: Raw: 2026 - March 9, 2026
shortSynopsis: Oba Femi and Rusev collide in a clash of WWE powerhouses. Six Superstars compete in a Gauntlet Match to decide AJ Lee's next challenger.

title: Boyfriend on Demand: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: Seo Mi-rae is worn out by work. Love? It's the last thing on her mind. But a virtual dating service sparks feelings — and maybe a real shot at romance.

title: That Night: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: When a young, naïve single mother gets embroiled in a murder during an island getaway, her sisters rush to help. But they only make things worse.

title: The TikTok Killer: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: This documentary follows a family's quest for the truth when a 42-year-old woman disappears in Spain — after meeting a popular TikToker while traveling.

title: A Friend, a Murderer: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: In this documentary, three friends recount their memories of a series of crimes that changed their lives and rocked their quiet corner of rural Denmark.

title: Girl From Nowhere The Reset: Season 1
shortSynopsis: In a new universe, the mysterious Nanno poses as a transfer student, exposing cruelty by turning power, guilt and desire against those who abuse them.

title: Pursuit of Jade: Season 1
shortSynopsis: To protect her family, a commoner marries a fallen nobleman. They fall in love, and she stands by him to fight for their future.

title: Phantom Lawyer: Season 1
shortSynopsis: When he suddenly gains the ability to see ghosts, a quiet lawyer recruits an ambitious rival to help his quirky spectral clients find corporeal justice.

title: Unfamiliar: Season 1
shortSynopsis: When the past catches up with two former spies, their biggest challenge isn't car chases, shootouts or fistfights — it's telling each other the truth.

title: BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Baki and the strongest Underground Arena fighters face a threat of historical proportions: the resurrected Musashi Miyamoto, Japan's greatest samurai.

title: Still Shining: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: After falling in love as teens, two young adults drift apart — only to reunite 10 years later and confront their heartbreak, growth and new challenges.
